title: teucrium divaricatum subsp. villosum
intro: Teucrium divaricatum subsp. villosum is a subspecies of the perennial herb Teucrium divaricatum, commonly known as the woolly germander or hairy germander. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Teucrium divaricatum subsp. villosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it has also been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, such as bronchitis and respiratory issues.
